title: Shut The Noise Up!
description: Automatically disables loud menu music and the narrator on startup.
body:
**Shut The Noise Up! 🔇**

Tired of Minecraft blasting loud music or enabling the narrator when starting the game?
Shut The Noise Up! automatically disables menu music and turns off the narrator on startup, giving you a cleaner and quieter experience every time you launch Minecraft.

![noice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02de015e2eff81c15695562d122db6dfb2babb0e.png)

**Client-side only.**

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**Perfect for:**

🎮 Modpacks

🛠️ Mod creators & developers

🎧 Players using voice chat or music

⚡ Faster and less annoying startups

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**

Automatically disables menu music

Automatically turns off the narrator

Lightweight and simple

Great for modpacks and development environments

No complicated setup required

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🛠️ Why?**

Many players and mod creators repeatedly disable the music or narrator while testing mods and modpacks. This mod does it automatically every time you launch the game.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

**❗ NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT**

**NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT**
